data.title: Two-Step Verification
data.description: An optional extra layer of security enabling users to prevent unauthorized access.
data.technical_spec: A six-digit PIN is required to authenticate new device logins.

data.title: Suspicious Login Alerts
data.description: Alerts users to potentially unauthorized logins or access to their account.
data.technical_spec: Monitors login patterns and flags unusual access.

data.title: Security Vulnerability Program
data.description: Offers rewards for identifying and reporting security vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Managed through Facebook's Bug Bounty Program.

data.title: Automatic Security Upgrades
data.description: Provides regular security updates and patches for known vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Distributed via app stores with mandatory upgrade prompts.

data.title: Message Forwarding Limits
data.description: Restricts the ability to forward messages to prevent spam and misinformation spread.
data.technical_spec: Algorithmic limits on the number of forwards allowed per message.
